name: Yaskawa Motoman
message: Founded in 1989, Yaskawa Motoman is the Robotics Division of Yaskawa America, Inc. It provides automation products and solutions for virtually every industry and robotic application; including arc welding, assembly, coating, dispensing, material handling and so on.You will see their projects, finance, agreements, employee's information and so on and so on.Feel free to check!Archive password: 8gD2$2!^qSs@
